src/app/page.tsx.title: Main Dashboard
src/app/page.tsx.summary: The home screen users land on after logging in. Shows project cards, activity feed, and key stats at a glance.

src/app/layout.tsx.title: App Shell
src/app/layout.tsx.summary: The outer wrapper for every page. Contains the sidebar navigation, top bar, and authentication provider.

src/app/projects/[id]/page.tsx.title: Project Board
src/app/projects/[id]/page.tsx.summary: A Kanban-style board for managing tasks within a project. Users drag cards between columns like To Do, In Progress, and Done.

src/app/settings/page.tsx.title: Account Settings
src/app/settings/page.tsx.summary: Where users manage their profile, team settings, and billing subscription.

src/app/login/page.tsx.title: Login Screen
src/app/login/page.tsx.summary: The sign-in page with email and password fields. Redirects to the dashboard after successful authentication.

src/components/Dashboard.tsx.title: Dashboard Layout
src/components/Dashboard.tsx.summary: Arranges the main dashboard into sections: project cards grid, recent activity feed, and a stats bar showing totals.

src/components/TaskBoard.tsx.title: Task Board
src/components/TaskBoard.tsx.summary: The interactive Kanban board with drag-and-drop columns. Talks to the tasks API to update status when cards are moved.

src/components/TaskCard.tsx.title: Task Card
src/components/TaskCard.tsx.summary: A single task displayed as a card showing the title, assignee avatar, priority badge, and due date.

src/components/Sidebar.tsx.title: Navigation Sidebar
src/components/Sidebar.tsx.summary: The left-hand navigation showing the list of projects, quick links, and the current user's workspace.

src/components/ActivityFeed.tsx.title: Activity Feed
src/components/ActivityFeed.tsx.summary: A real-time feed showing recent actions: tasks created, comments added, status changes. Updates live via WebSocket.

src/components/LoginForm.tsx.title: Login Form
src/components/LoginForm.tsx.summary: The email and password form with validation. Calls the auth API and stores the session token on success.

src/components/SettingsForm.tsx.title: Settings Form
src/components/SettingsForm.tsx.summary: Form fields for profile name, email, team preferences, and a section to manage the Stripe billing subscription.

src/hooks/useAuth.tsx.title: Authentication Hook
src/hooks/useAuth.tsx.summary: Manages the current user's login state. Provides sign-in, sign-out, and session refresh across the app.

src/hooks/useProjects.ts.title: Projects Hook
src/hooks/useProjects.ts.summary: Fetches and caches the list of projects for the current user. Subscribes to real-time updates when projects change.

src/hooks/useTasks.ts.title: Tasks Hook
src/hooks/useTasks.ts.summary: Fetches tasks for a specific project. Supports filtering by status and assignee, with real-time sync.

src/hooks/useRealtime.ts.title: Real-Time Hook
src/hooks/useRealtime.ts.summary: Connects to Supabase real-time channels to receive live updates when database rows change.

src/app/api/auth/route.ts.title: Authentication API
src/app/api/auth/route.ts.summary: Handles user login and session management. Validates credentials against Supabase and returns JWT tokens.

src/app/api/projects/route.ts.title: Projects API
src/app/api/projects/route.ts.summary: CRUD endpoints for projects. Checks permissions before allowing create, update, or delete operations.

src/app/api/tasks/route.ts.title: Tasks API
src/app/api/tasks/route.ts.summary: CRUD endpoints for tasks within projects. Supports status updates, assignment, and triggers AI suggestions for new tasks.

src/app/api/billing/route.ts.title: Billing API
src/app/api/billing/route.ts.summary: Manages subscription plans and payment methods via Stripe. Returns current plan details and handles upgrades.

src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts.title: Stripe Webhook Handler
src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts.summary: Receives payment events from Stripe (successful charges, failed payments, subscription changes) and updates the database.

src/app/api/ai/summarize/route.ts.title: AI Summarize API
src/app/api/ai/summarize/route.ts.summary: Takes a project's tasks and generates an AI-powered summary of progress, blockers, and suggested next steps.

src/services/stripe.ts.title: Stripe Payment Client
src/services/stripe.ts.summary: Configures and exports the Stripe SDK client. Provides helper functions for creating checkout sessions and processing webhooks.

src/services/ai-assistant.ts.title: AI Assistant Service
src/services/ai-assistant.ts.summary: Connects to OpenAI to power smart features: project summaries, task suggestions, and natural-language search.

src/services/email.ts.title: Email Notification Service
src/services/email.ts.summary: Sends transactional emails for team invitations, task assignments, and deadline reminders.

src/lib/supabase.ts.title: Supabase Database Client
src/lib/supabase.ts.summary: Initialises the Supabase client for database queries, authentication, and real-time subscriptions.

src/lib/openai.ts.title: OpenAI Client
src/lib/openai.ts.summary: Configures the OpenAI SDK with API credentials for use by the AI assistant service.

src/utils/jwt.ts.title: JWT Token Utils
src/utils/jwt.ts.summary: Signs and verifies JSON Web Tokens for session authentication between the frontend and API routes.

src/utils/formatDate.ts.title: Date Formatting
src/utils/formatDate.ts.summary: Formats dates into human-readable strings like '3 hours ago' or 'Jan 15, 2026' for display in the UI.

src/utils/validateEmail.ts.title: Input Validation
src/utils/validateEmail.ts.summary: Validates email addresses and passwords against format rules before sending to the server.

src/lib/permissions.ts.title: Permission Checks
src/lib/permissions.ts.summary: Checks whether the current user has permission to perform an action (view, edit, delete) on a project or task.

src/types/project.ts.title: Project & Task Types
src/types/project.ts.summary: TypeScript type definitions for projects, tasks, task statuses (To Do, In Progress, Done), and priority levels.

src/types/user.ts.title: User & Team Types
src/types/user.ts.summary: TypeScript type definitions for user profiles, teams, roles (admin, member, viewer), and workspace settings.

src/constants/priorities.ts.title: Priority Constants
src/constants/priorities.ts.summary: Defines the priority levels (Urgent, High, Medium, Low), their display labels, and colour codes used across the UI.
